title: Minimum Number Of K Consecutive Bit Flips
description: A move flips exactly k consecutive bits. Return the minimum moves needed to make every bit 1, or -1. Inputs use Python lists and integers; unless explicitly stated, callers need not preserve mutable inputs.
input_contract: Parameters in order: nums: list[int], k: int. 1 <= len(nums) <=100000; bits are 0/1; 1<=k<=len(nums); return -1 when impossible; input may be modified.
output_contract: Return integer using exact comparison. Python integer arithmetic has no 32-bit overflow; array/query order is significant.
